---
title: "temperature_fit"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)

source("../../R/load_functions.R")
triggerR <- load_trigger_functions()
rm(load_trigger_functions)
dir.create("../../outputs/temperature_fit", showWarnings = F)
```


```{r}
accounts <- if (!exists("accounts")) {
  triggerR$active_accounts()
} else accounts

trigger_daily <- if (!exists("trigger_daily")) {
  triggerR$read_trigger_tables(granularity = "daily", cores = 5)
} else trigger_daily
```

```{r, fig.width=7, fig.height=7}
p_temp_daily <- trigger_daily %>%
  filter(measurement == "temperature", type == "mean", n_obs_valid >= 10) %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2025-03-01"), date <= Sys.Date()) %>%
  left_join(accounts, by = "userId") %>%
  select(date, userId, country, value) %>%
  rename(temperature = value) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = temperature)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.15, size = 1) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "loess",
    span = .5,
    formula = y ~ x,
    se = TRUE,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ country) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_labels = "%b %Y",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.02))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Daily temperature trends by country",
    subtitle = "Mean daily temperature values with local smooth trends",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Temperature"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, colour = "grey40"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

p_temp_daily
```

```{r}
ggsave("../../outputs/temperature_fit/temperature_daily.png", 
       plot = p_temp_daily, width = 7, height = 7, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
rm(p_temp_daily)
```
